pg73-p1-s2: Having persevered with the rest of the program, they wondered why they fell.
pg73-p1-s3:
We think the
reason is that they never completed their housecleaning.
pg73-p1-s4:
They took inventory all right, but hung on to some of the worst
items in stock.
pg73-p1-s5:
They only thought they had lost their egoism and fear; they only thought they had humbled
themselves.
pg73-p1-s6:
But they had not learned enough of humility, fearlessness and honesty, in the sense we find it necessary,
until they told someone else all their life story.
pg73-p1:
invariably they got drunk. Having persevered with the rest of the program, they wondered why they fell. We think the
reason is that they never completed their housecleaning. They took inventory all right, but hung on to some of the worst
items in stock. They only thought they had lost their egoism and fear; they only thought they had humbled
themselves. But they had not learned enough of humility, fearlessness and honesty, in the sense we find it necessary,
until they told someone else all their life story.
pg73-p2-s1: More than most people, the alcoholic leads a double life.
pg73-p2-s2: He is very much the actor.
pg73-p2-s3:
To the outer world he presents his
stage character.
pg73-p2-s4: This is the one he likes his fellows to see.
pg73-p2-s5:
He wants to enjoy a certain reputation, but knows in his
heart he doesn't deserve it.
pg73-p2:
More than most people, the alcoholic leads a double life. He is very much the actor. To the outer world he presents his
stage character. This is the one he likes his fellows to see. He wants to enjoy a certain reputation, but knows in his
heart he doesn't deserve it.
pg73-p3-s1: The inconsistency is made worse by the things he does on his sprees.
pg73-p3-s2:
Coming to his senses, he is revolted at certain
episodes he vaguely remembers.
pg73-p3-s4: He trembles to think someone might have observed him.
pg73-p3-s5:
As
fast as he can, he pushes these memories far inside himself.
pg73-p3-s6: He hopes they will never see the light of day.
pg73-p3-s7:
He is under
constant fear and tension - that makes for more drinking.
pg73-p3:
The inconsistency is made worse by the things he does on his sprees. Coming to his senses, he is revolted at certain
episodes he vaguely remembers. These memories are a nightmare. He trembles to think someone might have observed him. As
fast as he can, he pushes these memories far inside himself. He hopes they will never see the light of day. He is under
constant fear and tension - that makes for more drinking.
pg73-p4-s1: Psychologists are inclined to agree with us.
pg73-p4-s2: We have spent thousands of dollars for examinations.
pg73-p4-s3:
We know but few
instances where we have given these doctors a fair break.
pg73-p4-s4:
We have seldom told them the whole truth nor have we followed
their advice.
pg73-p4-s5: Unwilling to be honest with these sympathetic men, we were honest with no one else.
pg73-p4-s6:
Small wonder many in
the medical profession have a low opinion of alcoholics and their chance for recovery!
pg73-p4:
Psychologists are inclined to agree with us. We have spent thousands of dollars for examinations. We know but few
instances where we have given these doctors a fair break. We have seldom told them the whole truth nor have we followed
their advice. Unwilling to be honest with these sympathetic men, we were honest with no one else. Small wonder many in
the medical profession have a low opinion of alcoholics and their chance for recovery!
pg73-p5-s1: We must be entirely honest with somebody if we
